LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Colossal.label: deactivated mech
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Colossal.description: A deactivated mechanoid in hibernation mode. A mechanitor can attempt to hack and control it.
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Huge.label: deactivated mech
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Huge.description: A deactivated mechanoid in hibernation mode. A mechanitor can attempt to hack and control it.
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Large.label: deactivated mech
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Large.description: A deactivated mechanoid in hibernation mode. A mechanitor can attempt to hack and control it.
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Medium.label: deactivated mech
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Medium.description: A deactivated mechanoid in hibernation mode. A mechanitor can attempt to hack and control it.
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Small.label: deactivated mech
LanguageData.FFF_MechCapsule_Small.description: A deactivated mechanoid in hibernation mode. A mechanitor can attempt to hack and control it.
